scripts.build: mkdir -p /tmp/hacoo-wrangler && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hacoo-wrangler vinext build && if [ -f dist/server/index.mjs ]; then cp dist/server/index.mjs dist/server/index.js; fi && if [ -f dist/server/ssr/index.mjs ]; then cp dist/server/ssr/index.mjs dist/server/ssr/index.js; fi && mkdir -p dist/.openai && cp .openai/hosting.json dist/.openai/hosting.json
